== Notes for [[Item:Q103392|Q103392]] ==

https://hal.science/hal-03331538/document

Identified in 1292 in Paris.

https://www.genealogieonline.nl/en/stamboom-haverbus/I40646847.php

----

Duplicate of https://www.geni.com/people/Contesse/6000000000348876662.

Note, however, that she is listed in (https://www.geni.com/people/Contesse/6000000000348876662) in the year 1292 in Paris as the wife of Baru l'Mestre (no children listed, no parentage listed). On the duplicate profile, a son is listed as being born in 1350, which is clearly impossible.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
